title: tambourissa neglecta
intro: Tambourissa neglecta is a species of flowering plant in the family Monimiaceae, native to the Pacific Islands. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains a range of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and alkaloids. The medicinal properties of Tambourissa neglecta have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as having anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Tambourissa neglecta is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function.
